debug_info.goal:
pbar : Pose
ε : ℝ
poly : GoodPoly
pc : GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition poly pbar ε
⊢ ‖GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.S poly pbar ε pc‖ *
      nth_partial 1 (GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu pbar ε poly pc) pbar.innerParams =
    inner ℝ (pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁θ (GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.S poly pbar ε pc)))
      (GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.w poly pbar ε pc)

proof:
have hS := pc.norm_S_ne_zero
  have hf : DifferentiableAt ℝ (rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w) pbar.innerParams := by fun_prop
  have h_unit : pc.fu = ‖pc.S‖⁻¹ • rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w := by
    ext x; simp [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu, rotproj_inner_unit, rotproj_inner, div_eq_inv_mul]
  simp only [nth_partial, h_unit]
  rw [(hf.hasFDerivAt.const_smul ‖pc.S‖⁻¹).fderiv, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_smul', Pi.smul_apply,
    smul_eq_mul, HasFDerivAt.rotproj_inner pbar pc.S pc.w |>.fderiv]
  simp [rotproj_inner', Fin.isValue]
  field_simp [hS.symm]
successful_attempts:
have hS := pc.norm_S_ne_zero
  have hf : DifferentiableAt ℝ (rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w) pbar.innerParams := by fun_prop
  have h_unit : pc.fu = ‖pc.S‖⁻¹ • rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w := by
    ext x; simp [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu, rotproj_inner_unit, rotproj_inner, div_eq_inv_mul]
  simp only [nth_partial, h_unit]
  rw [(hf.hasFDerivAt.const_smul ‖pc.S‖⁻¹).fderiv, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_smul', Pi.smul_apply,
    smul_eq_mul, HasFDerivAt.rotproj_inner pbar pc.S pc.w |>.fderiv]
  simp [rotproj_inner', Fin.isValue]
  field_simp [hS.symm]
